notes: Estimates use chars/4 as requested. Baseline input is the full fixture file read first (3566 chars / 4); baseline output is baseline.md (3084 chars / 4). Candidate input is fixture + SKILL.md + loaded references: intake-and-routing, response-structure, comment-taxonomy, action-mapping, tone-and-stance, difficult-cases, qa-checklist (37008 chars / 4). Candidate output is candidate.md (3266 chars / 4). Wall times are rough manual estimates for drafting and file assembly, not profiler measurements.
